title: cupania riopalenquensis
intro: Cupania riopalenquensis, also known as Cupania, is a plant species belonging to the family Sapindaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cupania riopalenquensis include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions such as wounds and ulcers. Herbal preparations of Cupania riopalenquensis often involve the leaves and stems being dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
